root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_tran_group.doc_no, sc_mem_m_tran_group.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_tran_group.membership_no) as memname, sc_mem_m_tran_group.group_old, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_tran_group.group_old) as group_old_name, sc_mem_m_tran_group.group_new, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_tran_group.group_new) as group_new_name, sc_mem_m_tran_group.entry_date, sc_mem_m_tran_group.entry_id, sc_mem_m_tran_group.app_status, sc_mem_m_tran_group.app_date, sc_mem_m_tran_group.app_id , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no) as group_control_name,
nvl(sc_mem_m_tran_group.share_balance,0) as share_balance, nvl(sc_mem_m_tran_group.emer_balance,0) as emer_balance, nvl(sc_mem_m_tran_group.norm_balance,0) as norm_balance, nvl(sc_mem_m_tran_group.spec_balance,0) as spec_balance, nvl(sc_mem_m_tran_group.fund_balance,0) as fund_balance,
'!adt_date_1!' as adt_date_from, '!adt_date_2!' as adt_date_to
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_tran_group, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_c
WHERE sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_no and ( sc_mem_m_tran_group.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_tran_group.group_old = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_tran_group.group_new = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_c.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_tran_group.app_status = '1' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_tran_group.app_date between '!adt_date_1!' and '!adt_date_2!' )
/*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_tran_group.membership_no
